heading: Child abuse prevention and treatment grants
label: 20104 Child abuse prevention and treatment grants
text: Amounts made available by for the purposes of this section shall be obligated and expended by the Secretary of Health and Human Services for grants under section 5106c of title 42. Any portion of an amount which is not obligated by the Secretary by the end of the fiscal year in which funds are made available for allocation, shall be reallocated for award under , except that with respect to funds deposited during fiscal year 1986 and made available for obligation during fiscal year 1987, any unobligated portion of such amount shall remain available for obligation until .section 20101(d)(2) of this title1section 20103(a) of this titleSee References in Text note below.1September 30, 1988
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section 109 of the Child Abuse Prevention and Treatment Act”, meaning , and was translated as reading section 107 of that act to reflect the probable intent of Congress and the renumbering of section 109 as section 107 by , title I, , .Section 5106c of title 42section 109 of Pub.
